sarva-rules-v0.label: Sarva Hybrid (rules + reasoning)
sarva-rules-v0.description: Hybrid keyword rules + confidence reasoning + capability bounds. Active until trained LoRA is served + promoted.

sarva-v2.label: Sarva Conductor v2 (Qwen2.5-14B QLoRA)
sarva-v2.description: TRAINED + pushed to HF (2026-07-09, RunPod A40, 3 epochs on sarva_master_train). Live-tested: correct confidence-gated routing. To activate: serve deploy/runpod/serve_sarva.py, set SARVA_INFERENCE_URL, then scripts/plug_sarva_after_train.py --promote --approve. NOTE: base is Qwen2.5-14B (paper's Nemotron-30B is nemotron_h hybrid, not Unsloth-trainable).

sarva-v3.label: Sarva Conductor v3 (Qwen2.5-14B QLoRA, §10 seed curriculum)
sarva-v3.description: Trained on RunPod A40 (459 steps, 3 epochs, §10 4-stage seed = 2440 rows). Validates the full GPU pipeline end-to-end; template payloads => NOT a quality upgrade over v2. Real corpora via convert_public.py pending. Not promoted; v2 stays active.

sarva-v4.label: Sarva Conductor v4 (Qwen2.5-14B QLoRA, REAL corpora)
sarva-v4.description: Trained on RunPod A100-80GB (764 steps, 2 epochs, 6100 rows = 4300 REAL coding records from Magicoder-OSS-Instruct + SWE-bench + CodeFeedback, mixed with structural seed). First non-template conductor. Candidate — needs eval before promotion; v2 stays active.

metrics.note: REAL-corpora SFT (not template) — genuine quality vs v3
